apps.page.title: 应用市场
apps.page.subtitle: 浏览、安装、运行和管理 Jetson 应用与示例
apps.banner.title: APP MARKET 一键部署 Jetson 应用
apps.banner.summary: 共 {total} 个应用，已安装 {installed} 个，状态检测中 {checking} 个
apps.msg.remote_required.title: 需要远程连接
apps.msg.remote_required.body: 当前运行在 PC 上。请先在 Remote 页面连接 Jetson 设备，再进行安装或部署。
apps.msg.l4t_detect_failed.title: L4T 检测失败
apps.msg.l4t_detect_failed.body:
无法读取当前设备的 L4T 版本，已跳过兼容性校验。

{name} 支持版本：{versions}
apps.msg.l4t_incompatible.title: L4T 版本不兼容
apps.msg.open_dialog_error:
打开应用对话框时发生异常：

{detail}
apps.msg.confirm_clean.title: 确认清理
apps.msg.confirm_clean.body: 确认清理 “{name}” 生成的数据吗？
apps.msg.confirm_uninstall.title: 确认卸载
apps.dialog.background.title: 最小化到后台
apps.dialog.background.body:
{name} 将在后台继续运行。

点击顶部状态栏可恢复此窗口。
apps.dialog.cancel.title: 取消操作？
apps.dialog.cancel.body:
{name} 仍在运行。

关闭窗口将停止当前进程。
apps.item.jtop.name: jtop 监控
apps.item.jtop.desc: jetson-stats 系统监控工具，实时查看 GPU / CPU / 内存使用率
apps.item.jupyter.name: Jupyter Lab
apps.item.jupyter.desc: 交互式 Python 开发环境，支持 GPU 监控插件
apps.item.nodered.name: Node-RED
apps.item.nodered.desc: 可视化流程编排工具，IoT 与边缘计算场景适用
apps.item.yolov26_dual_gmsl.name: YOLOv26 Dual GMSL
apps.item.yolov26_dual_gmsl.desc: 基于双路 GMSL 相机的 YOLOv26 TensorRT 视觉系统，运行检测、姿态和分割三路推理。
apps.item.jx_audiocraft.name: Audiocraft
apps.item.jx_audiocraft.desc: Launch `audiocraft` from jetson-examples. Disk 25GB. RAM 7GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0, 36.3.0.
apps.item.jx_comfyui.name: ComfyUI
apps.item.jx_comfyui.desc: Launch `comfyui` from jetson-examples. Disk 30GB. RAM 15GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0.
apps.item.jx_deep_live_cam.name: Deep Live Cam
apps.item.jx_deep_live_cam.desc: Launch `deep-live-cam` from jetson-examples. Disk 40GB. RAM 20GB. JetPack/L4T 36.3.0.
apps.item.jx_depth_anything.name: Depth Anything
apps.item.jx_depth_anything.desc: Launch `depth-anything` from jetson-examples. Disk 20GB. RAM 4GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0.
apps.item.jx_depth_anything_v2.name: Depth Anything V2
apps.item.jx_depth_anything_v2.desc: Launch `depth-anything-v2` from jetson-examples. Disk 15GB. RAM 4GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0.
apps.item.jx_depth_anything_v3.name: Depth Anything V3
apps.item.jx_depth_anything_v3.desc: Follow official full tutorial flow: install jetson-examples, run reComputer demo, enter container, build engine, and run USB camera demo.
apps.item.jx_gpt_oss.name: GPT-OSS
apps.item.jx_gpt_oss.desc: Launch `gpt-oss` from jetson-examples. Disk 50GB. RAM 14GB. JetPack/L4T 36.4.0, 36.4.3, 36.4.4.
apps.item.jx_llama_factory.name: Llama Factory
apps.item.jx_llama_factory.desc: Launch `llama-factory` from jetson-examples. Disk 25GB. RAM 7GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0.
apps.item.jx_llama3.name: Llama 3
apps.item.jx_llama3.desc: Launch `llama3` from jetson-examples. Disk 15GB. RAM 7GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0, 36.3.0.
apps.item.jx_llama3_2.name: Llama 3.2
apps.item.jx_llama3_2.desc: Launch `llama3.2` from jetson-examples. Disk 15GB. RAM 7GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0, 36.3.0.
apps.item.jx_llava.name: LLaVA
apps.item.jx_llava.desc: Launch `llava` from jetson-examples. Disk 15GB. RAM 7GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0, 36.3.0.
apps.item.jx_llava_v1_5_7b.name: LLaVA v1.5 7B
apps.item.jx_llava_v1_5_7b.desc: Launch `llava-v1.5-7b` from jetson-examples. Disk 25GB. RAM 7GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0, 36.3.0.
apps.item.jx_llava_v1_6_vicuna_7b.name: LLaVA v1.6 Vicuna 7B
apps.item.jx_llava_v1_6_vicuna_7b.desc: Launch `llava-v1.6-vicuna-7b` from jetson-examples. Disk 25GB. RAM 7GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0, 36.3.0.
apps.item.jx_nanodb.name: Nanodb
apps.item.jx_nanodb.desc: Launch `nanodb` from jetson-examples. Disk 80GB. RAM 15GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0, 36.3.0.
apps.item.jx_nanoowl.name: Nanoowl
apps.item.jx_nanoowl.desc: Launch `nanoowl` from jetson-examples. Disk 25GB. RAM 7GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0, 36.3.0.
apps.item.jx_nvblox.name: NVBlox
apps.item.jx_nvblox.desc: Launch `nvblox` from jetson-examples. Disk 60GB. RAM 14GB. JetPack/L4T 36.4.0, 36.4.3, 36.4.4.
apps.item.jx_ollama.name: Ollama
apps.item.jx_ollama.desc: Launch `ollama` from jetson-examples. Disk 15GB. RAM 7GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0, 36.3.0.
apps.item.jx_ros1_jp6.name: ROS 1 Noetic (JP6)
apps.item.jx_ros1_jp6.desc: Install ROS 1 Noetic Docker image from the built-in OneDrive archive. Import image as `ros:noetic`. Verify with `rosversion -d`. JetPack/L4T 36.4.0, 36.4.3, 36.4.4.
apps.item.jx_ros2_humble_jp6.name: ROS 2 Humble (JP6)
apps.item.jx_ros2_humble_jp6.desc: Install ROS 2 Humble Hawksbill natively via apt on Ubuntu 22.04 (JetPack 6). Installs ros-humble-desktop. Verify with `ros2 --version`. JetPack/L4T 36.4.0, 36.4.3, 36.4.4.
apps.item.jx_sheared_llama_2_7b_sharegpt: Launch `Sheared-LLaMA-2.7B-ShareGPT` from jetson-examples. Disk 25GB. RAM 7GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0, 36.3.0.
apps.item.jx_stable_diffusion_webui.name: Stable Diffusion WebUI
apps.item.jx_stable_diffusion_webui.desc: Launch `stable-diffusion-webui` from jetson-examples. Disk 25GB. RAM 7GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0, 36.3.0.
apps.item.jx_text_generation_webui.name: Text Generation WebUI
apps.item.jx_text_generation_webui.desc: Launch `text-generation-webui` from jetson-examples. Disk 25GB. RAM 7GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0, 36.3.0.
apps.item.jx_ultralytics_yolo.name: Ultralytics Yolo
apps.item.jx_ultralytics_yolo.desc: Launch `ultralytics-yolo` from jetson-examples. Disk 16GB. RAM 2GB. JetPack/L4T 32.6.1, 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0.
apps.item.jx_whisper.name: Whisper
apps.item.jx_whisper.desc: Launch `whisper` from jetson-examples. Disk 25GB. RAM 7GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0, 36.3.0.
apps.item.jx_yolov10.name: Yolov10
apps.item.jx_yolov10.desc: Launch `yolov10` from jetson-examples. Disk 20GB. RAM 4GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0, 36.3.0.
apps.item.jx_yolov8_rail_inspection.name: Yolov8 Rail Inspection
apps.item.jx_yolov8_rail_inspection.desc: Launch `yolov8-rail-inspection` from jetson-examples. Disk 20GB. RAM 4GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0, 36.3.0.
